summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard without GitHub mutation. No shared canonical exists. Security-sensitive PRs #81864 and #89618 are quarantined for central security handling. The remaining open PRs are kept open for maintainer or author follow-up because the job disallows merge/fix/raise_pr and several items have unresolved review, proof, dependency, or product-direction gates.
